what_was_learned.baseline_truth: Route/API/assets truth is valid; FPS remains below budget.
what_was_learned.pressure_balance: File assets are not primary blocker; CSS/JS/effect pressure is likely primary.
what_was_learned.owner_intent: Optimization must be surgical, measurable, reversible, and truth-preserving.

why: Motion/throttle is the safest first reversible slice to reduce frame pressure before deeper CSS/JS surgery.
must_verify_after_implementation: average FPS and 1% low FPS trend upward
when_visual_construction_can_resume: Only after FPS acceptance criteria are met and sustained with truth gates intact.
